ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT( $User.Bypass_Validation_Rules__c ), $RecordType.Id ='01220000000MLar', ISBLANK( Return_date_time__c ), ISBLANK( Expected_Return_Date__c ) , ( TEXT(External_Case_Category__c)='Assistance' ), (TEXT( External_Case_Detail__c )='Case'), (TEXT( External_description__c )='Registered') )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: This field is mandatory and must be filled if 'Return Date and Time' stays empty.
